name: Candied Pineapple
recipeIngredient: 1 can (20 ounce) pineapple slices, packed in own juice, drained and reserved 1/3 cup juice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart casserole dish, combine the sugar, reserved pineapple juice, and corn syrup.
2. Arrange five pineapple slices in a single layer over the sugar mixture.
3. Microwave on High for 8-12 minutes, or until the sugar dissolves and the slices are glossy and transparent on the edges. Turn the slices over and rearrange them every 4 minutes.
4. Remove the slices to a wire rack and let cool. They will become more transparent as they cool.
5. Add the remaining pineapple slices to the hot syrup and repeat steps 3-4.
6. When all slices have cooled completely, coat them with sugar.
7. Cover with wax paper and let stand on the wire rack for at least 24 hours to dry.
8. Recoat the slices with sugar. They will be slightly sticky.
9. Store in an airtight container with wax paper between layers for no more than 2 weeks.
